notes: All module-owned tables have read and write usecase coverage.
All lifecycle transitions are covered by existing usecases.
All read usecases have empty writesTables as required.
Layer 3 is correctly the only layer accessing external (MDM) tables.

trace: Analyzed all module-owned tables for read/write usecase coverage
